## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? A sentence or two is plenty. -->

## If a roadmap step's done-status changed

- [ ] Updated `ROADMAP.md` **and** `roadmap.html` together, same commit
- [ ] Ran `node tools/check-roadmap.mjs` — printed `✅ PASS`
- [ ] Updated `CLAUDE.md`'s "Current status" line

## If a creative or technical decision was made

- [ ] Logged it in `DECISIONS.md` (Lewis's picks in the Decisions Made table; Jeff's technical calls in the table below it)

## Test plan

- [ ] Played it in a real browser — what did you check?
- [ ] No new console/page errors
